name: Fountain Retreat
tagline: A grand contemporary estate where the Minho hills meet the Atlantic.
description:
Set on a gentle hillside above Viana do Castelo, Fountain Retreat commands panoramic views of the Lima estuary and the Atlantic beyond. The property is a study in contemporary Portuguese architecture: clean lines, floor to ceiling glass, and natural stone that ages beautifully with the coastal light.

Twelve bedroom suites are spread across three connected pavilions, each with its own terrace and blackout curtains. The main living space opens onto a 20 metre infinity pool that seems to dissolve into the horizon. Below, terraced gardens lead to a private orchard of citrus and fig trees.

Mornings begin with pasteis de nata still warm from the local padaria, delivered by our team before you wake. Your private chef can prepare a full Portuguese breakfast on the terrace, or a seven course tasting menu featuring Minho specialities: octopus rice, lamprey in season, and arroz de sarrabulho.

The town of Viana do Castelo is a ten minute drive. The wild beaches of Afife and Moledo are fifteen minutes north. The Spanish border and the Mino river are thirty minutes away. Our concierge knows every fisherman, every winemaker, every hidden cove.
stayIncludes: Premium arrival preparation. Deep clean, styling, amenities.
Hotel grade linens, robes, and pool towels.
Welcome hamper with curated local products.
Pre arrival preparation and 47 point quality checks.
